title: Star Items Texture
description: A resourcepack that allows you to change the textures of items by renaming them.
body:
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oFqlf4C0/images/3a5bec34fd597d98d23e9309130612473f4f8540.png)

For correct work you need Optifine or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
---------------------

Take any item from the list and rename it in the anvil. The names of the items and their full list are shown in the table below.

This one works with wood, stone, gold, iron, diamond, netherite tools.

English                                      Russian
---------------------
| Item name | Rename to | Название предмета | Переименовать в |
|----------------|:----------------:|:----------------:|:----------------:|
| Sword | Star Sword | Меч | Звездный меч |
| Axe | Star Axe | Топор | Звездный топор |
| Pickaxe | Star Pickaxe | Кирка | Звездная кирка |
| Shovel | Star Shovel | Лопата | Звездная лопата |
| Hoe | Star Shovel | Мотыга | Звездная мотыга |
| Secret | ??? | Секрет | ??? |

[![Discord](https://discord.com/api/guilds/1241541216353521754/widget.png)](https://discord.gg/JkVv25CpfE)
